title: Make release distribution check private-repo aware

sources.reason: The release distribution check needs to reuse authenticated checkout headers when the repository is private.
The regression test coverage needs to confirm the auth header and public repository override paths.

riskAssessment.reason: The release distribution checker now reads authenticated checkout headers for private CI repositories while preserving public release validation.

executionDecision.reason: The workflow fix is narrowly scoped and directly verifiable.

preReviewWarnings: Verify that the release checker reuses checkout-auth headers without exposing secrets in logs.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: make check-release-distribution can run in a private repository CI environment.
The release distribution check still works in a public repository environment.
The regression tests cover checkout-auth headers and explicit repository overrides.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The release distribution check currently clones a GitHub URL without reusing the authenticated checkout context, which fails in CI after the repository is made private because the checker does not have access to the private repository.
constraints: Do not change the public release validation semantics beyond how the repository URL is supplied.
Keep the release distribution check reproducible in CI and locally.
intent.rationale: Reusing the authenticated checkout header preserves the existing release verification logic while making it work in private-repo CI without changing workflow semantics.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
